title: ventilago ferruginea
intro: Ventilago ferruginea, also known as the ironwood tree or red ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ventilago ferruginea include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and providing relief from fever and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory problems.
